brand.name: BookedOnCall
brand.tagline: AI phone assistant for trades businesses
brand.description: BookedOnCall is an AI phone assistant for home-service businesses that answers inbound calls, captures job details, and moves each caller toward a safe booking path or clear callback based on the shop's reviewed setup.

positioning.oneLiner: BookedOnCall is an AI phone assistant for home-service businesses that answers inbound calls, captures job details, and moves each caller toward a safe booking path or clear callback based on the shop's reviewed setup.

validatedCapabilities: Answers inbound calls for plumbing, HVAC, electrical, painting, flooring, landscaping, roofing, and general home-service businesses.
Collects caller name, callback number, address, job details, and service notes.
Can offer appointment paths only when scheduling is enabled, the workflow is configured, and the request fits the shop's booking rules.
Supports setup-reviewed Jobber, Google Calendar, and customer text messaging workflows after the needed connection checks.
Delivers a clear call summary and the next step, whether that is a booked appointment or a callback request.
Can send follow-up texts when customer messaging is turned on.

sourcedProof.title: 54% said they would not leave a voicemail
sourcedProof.detail: In Moneypenny's 2023 Censuswide survey of UK and US consumers, over half said they would not leave a voicemail when calling a business.

sourcedProof.title: Fast response can increase your ability to receive leads
sourcedProof.detail: Google says consistently fast response time can improve ad ranking and increase a provider's ability to receive leads.

sourcedProof.title: $17.90/hour median receptionist wage
sourcedProof.detail: The U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics reported a median hourly wage of $17.90 for receptionists in May 2024.

integrations.name: Jobber
integrations.description: Use Jobber as a configured workflow so BookedOnCall can fit the scheduling process you already use after setup review.

integrations.name: Google Calendar
integrations.description: Use Google Calendar as a configured workflow so BookedOnCall can check availability before offering supported appointment paths.

integrations.name: Text / SMS
integrations.description: Use customer text messaging as a configured workflow for supported follow-up, confirmations, and callback communication.

integrations.name: QuickBooks
integrations.description: Roadmap-only: QuickBooks is a targeted future integration for customer context and office follow-up, but it is not live in BookedOnCall today.

integrations.name: Housecall Pro
integrations.description: Roadmap-only: Housecall Pro is a possible future integration for shops that want BookedOnCall to fit their existing field-service workflow.

integrations.name: ServiceTitan
integrations.description: Roadmap-only: ServiceTitan is a possible future integration for larger shops that want BookedOnCall to fit their existing CSR and dispatch workflow.

plans.name: Starter
plans.summary: For owner-operators and small shops that want missed calls handled with clean intake, owner-approved booking requests, and clear callback coverage.
features: Trades-focused call answering and lead intake
Callback capture and owner-approved booking requests when you want to step in
Booking paths when your reviewed setup and connected schedule allow it
Jobber or Google Calendar workflows when configured
Call summaries with the next step clearly laid out

plans.name: Pro
plans.summary: For shops that want more included minutes, a more branded caller experience, and tighter owner-review workflow.
features: Trades-focused call answering and lead intake
Callback capture and owner-approved booking requests when you want to step in
Booking paths when your reviewed setup and connected schedule allow it
Jobber or Google Calendar workflows when configured
Call summaries with the next step clearly laid out
Give the assistant a custom name
Customize the greeting and assistant behavior
